reviews.review_title: Like Land's End, but with paper planes!
reviews.review_description: [Played on Go] It has the same low poly art style, gorgeous environments, and relaxing gameplay as Land's End. The addition of the paper airplane throwing mechanic is incredibly satisfying with the hand controller. It's the sort of experience you can lose yourself in for an hour without realizing it. This adventure game is highly recommended!
Like the game and the whole look. Respect. Aiming is after a while easy. You have different papers with different Specials.
I just played this game for 2 hours and stopped only because my headset battery was low. This is a calm but somewhat challenging game that is unique in the Oculus store.

reviews.review_title: 1star review RE Gear should be removed.
reviews.review_description:
This game is excellent. The graphics are beautiful. It’s very relaxing. A little weird getting the hang of what to do initially, but very cool. 

7/21/19 There’s a 1 star review someone left because they bought it in the Gear store and the dev didn’t make it for the Gear...that review is dragging this awesome game down from the solid TRUE 4.5 star-rating it has earned. 
Thank you to the dev for an excellent game and the willingness to make the game for Gear once it was requested.

That earns a 5 star review if you ask me!

Looks great and obviously a 5 star but at startup when it says new games it just skips to the tutorial without letting me choose a new game and shows a Quest controller which tells me to press trigger to grab a plane but doesn't work. please fix i really want to check this out im using s6 edge plus. note: please add rotation to the gear vr controller i have no swivel chair thanks.

developer_response.body:
Update [19th Aug 2019]:
This problem has been fixed and is now live on the GearVR store for S8 or better devices.  Sadly we use a graphics chip feature that's not supported on older devices 😭. 
I tried my best, but as you're using an S6, the game isn't supported - I'm afraid the only option for you is to request a refund from the store.  
I'm truly sorry about this,
Chris.

--
Hi, I’m really sorry this happened to you.  we never tested with GearVR and didn’t even realise it would show on the GearVR store!
I’m working on a fix that I should be able to test on monday.  As soon as it goes live we’ll let you know.

(Once it does, touchpad clicks will rotate you, same as on Go, no swivel chair necessary! :) )

reviews.review_description:
100% love this game. It's my perfect relaxer after a day at work. Painting the world with color as you move through the levels. Pluck Paper airplanes out of the air as they  fly about and around you. There are different planes depending on what you need. Planes are thrown with a flick of the wrist and you send your plane on the way. Twist left or right, up and down to control the way the plane moves. 

Don't pass up on this one. It's a total pleasure to play

I just spent my first solid 2 hours playing this game.  I had to quit because the headset was dying (I honestly didn't realize so much time passed.  This game is truly enjoyable.  This is a great use of VR and the Oculus Go.  Great job dev.  I'll have to keep an eye out for more games from you.
